primary.name: Slate Navy
primary.description: Used for primary text, headings, and strong interactive elements.

secondary.name: Soft Blue
secondary.description: Backgrounds for cards or subtle highlights.

accent.name: Warm Sand
accent.description: Warmth to balance the clinical blue/white.

risk_levels.description: Muted, not neon. Clinical status indicators.

layout_strategies.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Landing, High Density (Mode B) for Admin
layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned content for readability, centered Hero if high impact.

hero_section.type: Split or Centered with High-Res Image
elements: Headline: 'Transform Your Health, Reclaim Your Life'
CTA: 'Start Your Free Health Assessment' (Triggers Modal)
Visual: High-quality clinic interior or doctor-patient interaction

calculator_modal.style: Clean, minimal inputs, well-spaced. No clutter. Auto-calculate BMI.
calculator_modal.logic_visuals: Progress bar, clear 'Next' buttons, Risk Zone result card.

charts.style: Minimal axes, soft colors (matching palette), custom tooltips.

lead_capture.style: Embedded in Result Card or separate Modal step.

assets.icons: Use Lucide-React for all iconography (Stethoscope, Activity, Calendar, ArrowRight, etc).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Health Risk Calculator' as a global modal accessible from Hero CTA.
Use 'Manrope' font for all headings to establish the luxury clinical feel.
Ensure 'Inter' is used for body text for maximum readability.
Use 'Recharts' for the data visualization section with custom minimally styled tooltips.
Admin Dashboard must be protected by a simple /admin route (no auth for now as per user choice, but structure it for future).
Use Asian BMI cutoffs: <23 (Normal), 23-27.5 (Overweight), >=27.5 (Obese) - wait, prompt says <27.5 Green, 27.5-32.4 Yellow, >=32.5 Red. Follow PROMPT logic strictly.
Strictly follow the PROMPT logic for Risk Zones: Green (<27.5), Yellow (27.5-32.4 + comorbidity), Red (>=32.5).
Ensure all medical data has a visible disclaimer: 'Results are estimates. Consult a professional.'
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Lead submitted successfully').
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text or heavy backgrounds. Stick to flat, clean luxury colors.
Use 2x padding than normal. White space is luxury.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use medical-relevant placeholder text if real content is missing.
Ensure the layout is responsive mobile-first.
